prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2601afb7`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_2601afb7`. The rule is: keep the same odd columns, rotate the bars’ top-row sequence left by one bar, rotate the bars’ color sequence right by one bar, and repaint the bottom-anchored vertical bars on background `7`. I discarded the `sonnet45` hint as wrong and used the `opus46` hint only as a partial clue, then corrected it in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2601afb7/notes.md); no new primitive was needed.

Verification passed end to end: `4/4` official examples passed, the shared builder produced 1000 examples plus previews, `1000/1000` generated examples passed, and [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/2601afb7/previews/preview_01.png) looks on-distribution. The generator stays close to the official family by using square `7x7`/`9x9`/`11x11` orange grids with `3-5` odd-column bars and a mix of tall and short heights.
